question: Mom has reminded you, for fifty-six years, of a moment at your engagement party in Baghdad — your father in the hallway saying she was pretty but too skinny, and you saying yes. She heard the whole exchange. Brian has written it into a new chapter. Is the dialogue right? Did you really only say yes, or did you push back? What do you actually remember of that hallway moment?
answer: When my father sai she is too skin
